messages.content: Build a pure MusicAlbum Decider from scratch in TypeScript with compile-clean strict types and a typed domain error.
How do I implement a Playlist aggregate using evolve as a pure reducer over a typed event stream? Show a minimal example.
Write a Concert decide() with domain guards that rejects cancellation of an already-started show.
Build a projection for a VenueBooking read model from scratch using project() over a denormalised View type.
Build a Setlist Snapshot loader from scratch with versioned upgraders from v1 -> v2 -> v3.
Implement optimistic concurrency for a FanClub aggregate using expectedRevision and a typed ConcurrencyConflict error.
What's the v1 way to run a subscription from a saved checkpoint for a RoyaltyPool projection? Show a minimal example.
Build a CommandHandler for a RecordingSession aggregate that loads, decides, and appends with expected revision.
Write a generic aggregateStream helper that folds an AsyncIterable of events into a state. Use it to replay a TourLeg.
Translate a MerchDrop domain event to an outbox integration event. Some domain events must map to null.
Explain briefly how the outbox pattern works, then implement appendWithOutbox for a StreamingWindow aggregate.
Write a stateless process manager for Concert logistics: TicketsSold -> AllocateSeats, SeatsAllocated -> NotifyFans.
Show me how upcasting works: migrate an old MusicAlbum v1 event shape to the current v2 shape at read time.
Build a read-model rebuild loop for a VenueBooking view from revision 0 with batching and resume support.
Write a CQRS boundary for Playlist: handleCommand via Decider + EventStore, queryView via read store.
Write an Effect-wrapped CommandHandler for a MerchDrop stream that reads, decides, and appends inside Effect.gen.
Write an event-sourcing example that rebuilds a RoyaltyPool read model in chunks with a persisted checkpoint. Constraints: strict types, no any, explicit never exhaustion.
Build a Setlist CommandHandler from scratch that composes decide/evolve, appends events, and surfaces a typed ConcurrencyConflict.
How do I project a Concert revenue read model? Show project() with fields denormalised for fast queries.
Write a MusicAlbum subscription runner from a checkpoint using an Effect.gen wrapper.
Implement a typed Playlist decide with domain guards. A locked playlist rejects further additions.

Add optimistic concurrency control to this VenueBooking append helper:

```typescript
async function appendBooking(store: any, stream: string, events: unknown[]) {}
```
Build a RecordingSession saga skeleton from scratch: SessionOpened -> ReserveStudio, StudioReserved -> NotifyProducer.
Explain how Snapshot + upgrade works, then build a Playlist snapshot loader with v1 -> v2 -> v3 upgraders.
Write a pure project() for a TourLeg city-visit counter from scratch.
Write an integration outbox for StreamingWindow events. Constraints: pure translate, null for internal events, schema versioned.
Build a FanClub CQRS boundary with separate handleCommand and queryView paths sharing only the event DU.
Build a Concert read-model rebuild from revision 0 with batched reads and a persist hook. Constraints: no any, explicit cursor advance.
Write an upcaster that migrates old FanClub 'MemberJoined' v1 (memberName) events into v2 (memberId, memberName). Throw UnknownEventError on unknown types.
Write a generic aggregateStream and use it with Effect.gen to load a MusicAlbum from an EventStore.

Targeted fix: this VenueBooking decide mutates state and has no never default. Make it pure and exhaustive.

```typescript
function decide(cmd: any, state: any) { state.pending = true; return []; }
```
Explain the Decider pattern in one paragraph, then implement it for RoyaltyPool with a typed InvariantError.
Build a MerchDrop command handler over an EventStore interface using aggregateStream to replay.

Refactor this Setlist projection so project() handles each event exhaustively and ignores unrelated ones by returning the view unchanged.

```typescript
function project(v: any, e: any) { if (e.type === 'Added') v.count++; return v; }
```
What's the idiom for reading a stream with an Effect.gen wrapper around readStream? Show a minimal RoyaltyPool example.
Build a TourLeg outbox append from scratch using a transactional Conn. Persist domain events and outbox rows atomically.
